lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਕਮਲੁ ਪ੍ਰਗਾਸਿਆ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਭਰਿਆ ਅਘਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: antar kamal pragaasiaa amrit bhariaa aghaae |
lines.english: The lotus blossoms deep within the heart, and filled with Ambrosial Nectar, one is satisfied.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਾਰੇ ਅਗਨਿ ਨਿਵਾਰਿ ਮਰੁ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਲੁ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: chaare agan nivaar mar guramukh har jal paae |
lines.english: The Gurmukh puts out the four fires, with the Water of the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਤਗੁਰੁ ਮੀਤੁ ਕਰਿ ਸਚੁ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਦਰਗਹ ਜਾਇ ॥੪॥੨੦॥
lines.translit: naanak satagur meet kar sach paaveh daragah jaae |4|20|
lines.english: O Nanak, make the True Guru your friend; going to His Court, you shall obtain the True Lord. ||4||20||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਹੁ ਪਿਆਰਿਆ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਲੇ ਹਰਿ ਬੋਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: har har japahu piaariaa guramat le har bol |
lines.english: Meditate on the Lord, Har, Har, O my beloved; follow the Guru's Teachings, and speak of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਸਚ ਕਸਵਟੀ ਲਾਈਐ ਤੁਲੀਐ ਪੂਰੈ ਤੋਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: man sach kasavattee laaeeai tuleeai poorai tol |
lines.english: Apply the Touchstone of Truth to your mind, and see if it comes up to its full weight.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੀਮਤਿ ਕਿਨੈ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ਰਿਦ ਮਾਣਕ ਮੋਲਿ ਅਮੋਲਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: keemat kinai na paaeeai rid maanak mol amol |1|
lines.english: No one has found the worth of the ruby of the heart; its value cannot be estimated. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਈ ਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਹੀਰਾ ਗੁਰ ਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: bhaaee re har heeraa gur maeh |
lines.english: O Siblings of Destiny, the Diamond of the Lord is within the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਸਤਗੁਰੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਅਹਿਨਿਸਿ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਲਾਹਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: satasangat satagur paaeeai ahinis sabad salaeh |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The True Guru is found in the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation. Day and night, praise the Word of His Shabad. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਵਖਰੁ ਧਨੁ ਰਾਸਿ ਲੈ ਪਾਈਐ ਗੁਰ ਪਰਗਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: sach vakhar dhan raas lai paaeeai gur paragaas |
lines.english: The True Merchandise, Wealth and Capital are obtained through the Radiant Light of the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਅਗਨਿ ਮਰੈ ਜਲਿ ਪਾਇਐ ਤਿਉ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਦਾਸਨਿ ਦਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: jiau agan marai jal paaeiai tiau trisanaa daasan daas |
lines.english: Just as fire is extinguished by pouring on water, desire becomes the slave of the Lord's slaves.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮ ਜੰਦਾਰੁ ਨ ਲਗਈ ਇਉ ਭਉਜਲੁ ਤਰੈ ਤਰਾਸਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jam jandaar na lagee iau bhaujal tarai taraas |2|
lines.english: The Messenger of Death will not touch you; in this way, you shall cross over the terrifying world-ocean, carrying others across with you. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਕੂੜੁ ਨ ਭਾਵਈ ਸਚਿ ਰਤੇ ਸਚ ਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh koorr na bhaavee sach rate sach bhaae |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs do not like falsehood. They are imbued with Truth; they love only Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਕਤ ਸਚੁ ਨ ਭਾਵਈ ਕੂੜੈ ਕੂੜੀ ਪਾਂਇ ॥
lines.translit: saakat sach na bhaavee koorrai koorree paane |
lines.english: The shaaktas, the faithless cynics, do not like the Truth; false are the foundations of the false.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਮਾਣਕੁ ਲਾਲੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਤਨੁ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਹੀਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: man meh maanak laal naam ratan padaarath heer |
lines.english: Within the mind are emeralds and rubies, the Jewel of the Naam, treasures and diamonds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਿ ਰਤੇ ਗੁਰਿ ਮੇਲਿਐ ਸਚੇ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sach rate gur meliai sache sach samaae |3|
lines.english: Imbued with Truth, you shall meet the Guru. The true ones are absorbed into the True Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਵਖਰੁ ਧਨੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਹੈ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਗਹਿਰ ਗੰਭੀਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sach vakhar dhan naam hai ghatt ghatt gahir ganbheer |
lines.english: The Naam is the True Merchandise and Wealth; in each and every heart, His Presence is deep and profound.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਦਇਆ ਕਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਹੀਰੁ ॥੪॥੨੧॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh paaeeai deaa kare har heer |4|21|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukh finds the Diamond of the Lord, by His Kindness and Compassion. ||4||21||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਰਮੇ ਭਾਹਿ ਨ ਵਿਝਵੈ ਜੇ ਭਵੈ ਦਿਸੰਤਰ ਦੇਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: bharame bhaeh na vijhavai je bhavai disantar des |
lines.english: The fire of doubt is not extinguished, even by wandering through foreign lands and countries.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਮੈਲੁ ਨ ਉਤਰੈ ਧ੍ਰਿਗੁ ਜੀਵਣੁ ਧ੍ਰਿਗੁ ਵੇਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: antar mail na utarai dhrig jeevan dhrig ves |
lines.english: If inner filth is not removed, one's life is cursed, and one's clothes are cursed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਰੁ ਕਿਤੈ ਭਗਤਿ ਨ ਹੋਵਈ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੇ ਉਪਦੇਸ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: hor kitai bhagat na hovee bin satigur ke upades |1|
lines.english: There is no other way to perform devotional worship, except through the Teachings of the True Guru. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਰੇ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਅਗਨਿ ਨਿਵਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: man re guramukh agan nivaar |
lines.english: O mind, become Gurmukh, and extinguish the fire within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਕਹਿਆ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਹਉਮੈ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਮਾਰਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur kaa kahiaa man vasai haumai trisanaa maar |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Let the Words of the Guru abide within your mind; let egotism and desires die. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਮਾਣਕੁ ਨਿਰਮੋਲੁ ਹੈ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮਿ ਪਤਿ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: man maanak niramol hai raam naam pat paae |
lines.english: The jewel of the mind is priceless; through the Name of the Lord, honor is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲਿ ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: mil satasangat har paaeeai guramukh har liv laae |
lines.english: Join the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation, and find the Lord. The Gurmukh embraces love for the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੁ ਗਇਆ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਮਿਲਿ ਸਲਲੈ ਸਲਲ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aap geaa sukh paaeaa mil salalai salal samaae |2|
lines.english: Give up your selfishness, and you shall find peace; like water mingling with water, you shall merge in absorption. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਚੇਤਿਓ ਸੁ ਅਉਗੁਣਿ ਆਵੈ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jin har har naam na chetio su aaugun aavai jaae |
lines.english: Those who have not contemplated the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, are unworthy; they come and go in reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਸਤਗੁਰੁ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਨ ਭੇਟਿਓ ਸੁ ਭਉਜਲਿ ਪਚੈ ਪਚਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jis satagur purakh na bhettio su bhaujal pachai pachaae |
lines.english: One who has not met with the True Guru, the Primal Being, is bothered and bewildered in the terrifying world-ocean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਮਾਣਕੁ ਜੀਉ ਨਿਰਮੋਲੁ ਹੈ ਇਉ ਕਉਡੀ ਬਦਲੈ ਜਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: eihu maanak jeeo niramol hai iau kauddee badalai jaae |3|
lines.english: This jewel of the soul is priceless, and yet it is being squandered like this, in exchange for a mere shell. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿੰਨਾ ਸਤਗੁਰੁ ਰਸਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਸੇ ਪੂਰੇ ਪੁਰਖ ਸੁਜਾਣ ॥
lines.translit: jinaa satagur ras milai se poore purakh sujaan |
lines.english: Those who joyfully meet with the True Guru are perfectly fulfilled and wise.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਮਿਲਿ ਭਉਜਲੁ ਲੰਘੀਐ ਦਰਗਹ ਪਤਿ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur mil bhaujal langheeai daragah pat paravaan |
lines.english: Meeting with the Guru, they cross over the terrifying world-ocean. In the Court of the Lord, they are honored and approved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤੇ ਮੁਖ ਉਜਲੇ ਧੁਨਿ ਉਪਜੈ ਸਬਦੁ ਨੀਸਾਣੁ ॥੪॥੨੨॥
lines.translit: naanak te mukh ujale dhun upajai sabad neesaan |4|22|
lines.english: O Nanak, their faces are radiant; the Music of the Shabad, the Word of God, wells up within them. ||4||22||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਣਜੁ ਕਰਹੁ ਵਣਜਾਰਿਹੋ ਵਖਰੁ ਲੇਹੁ ਸਮਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: vanaj karahu vanajaariho vakhar lehu samaal |
lines.english: Make your deals, dealers, and take care of your merchandise.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੈਸੀ ਵਸਤੁ ਵਿਸਾਹੀਐ ਜੈਸੀ ਨਿਬਹੈ ਨਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: taisee vasat visaaheeai jaisee nibahai naal |
lines.english: Buy that object which will go along with you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜਸੁ ਵਖਰੁ ਲੈ ਚਲਹੁ ਸਹੁ ਦੇਖੈ ਪਤੀਆਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har jas vakhar lai chalahu sahu dekhai pateeae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Take the Merchandise of the Lord's Praises with you. Your Husband Lord shall see this and approve. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗੈ ਸਾਹੁ ਸੁਜਾਣੁ ਹੈ ਲੈਸੀ ਵਸਤੁ ਸਮਾਲਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: agai saahu sujaan hai laisee vasat samaal |1|
lines.english: In the next world, the All-knowing Merchant will take this object and care for it. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਈ ਰੇ ਰਾਮੁ ਕਹਹੁ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhaaee re raam kahahu chit laae |
lines.english: O Siblings of Destiny, chant the Lord's Name, and focus your consciousness on Him.
